name: ADL - Cook(Cup Noodles)
summary: Cup Noodle Content lets you boil cup noodles directly in virtual reality. Fill the coffee pot with water. While the water boils, open the cup noodle lid. Pour the seasoning packet and powdered soup over the noodles. Once the water boils, pour it into the container up to the fill line and wait. Designed to improve your skills through repeated practice of boiling cup noodles.
